top_signals.title: Gold Edges Higher as Traders Weigh Iran Deal; Await Fed Decision
top_signals.summary: Gold edged higher as traders weighed an interim US-Iran deal while awaiting the Federal Reserve interest-rate decision under new Chair Kevin Warsh.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: BYD Takes On Luxury EV Rivals in China With More Affordable SUV
top_signals.summary: BYD Co. showed off its largest electric car to date under its namesake brand, as the Chinese automaker attempts to challenge premium rivals with a more affordable sport utility vehicle.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: CarMax Falls as Turnaround Fails to Stem Used Vehicle Slide
top_signals.summary: CarMax Inc.’s shares dropped after same-store sales and used-car profit declined for a fourth straight quarter, raising questions about the durability of its turnaround effort.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Komatsu may follow rivals in raising prices in North America: CFO
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Allianz CEO Says Risk Isn't Properly Priced at the Moment
top_signals.summary: "We need to be very careful in terms of how we allocate money," Allianz CEO Oliver Baete says while discussing the state of financial markets on "Bloomberg Open Interest."  (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Carbon markets must industrialise or the net zero transition stalls
top_signals.summary: When nearly three in four of the world’s largest companies commit to something, it signals a fundamental shift in how business leaders think about risk and opportunity. Climate Impact Partners’ latest analysis of Fortune Global 500 companies found that 72 per cent now hold at least one climate commitment, up from fewer than one in [...]

top_signals.title: FortiBleed leak exposes Fortinet VPN credentials for 73,000 devices.
top_signals.summary: A newly discovered data leak dubbed "FortiBleed" has exposed what appears to be a collection of Fortinet and FortiGate VPN credentials for 73,932 firewall URLs at organizations worldwide. [...]
